content.text:
Contoso offers a product called the Contoso Galaxy Innovations SmartView Glasses, which belong to the Smart Eyewear category. Key features of these glasses include:

- An Augmented Reality (AR) interface
- A voice-controlled AI agent
- HD video recording with 3D audio
- UV protection and blue light filtering
- Wireless charging with extended battery life

The SmartView Glasses come with a two-year limited warranty on electronic components and a 30-day return policy with no questions asked.
